arts.ttl: Buongiorno’s journey: From Torino’s heart to Napoli’s ambition
arts.sum: Alessandro Buongiorno’s return to Turin for the fourteenth matchday of Serie A marks a special challenge as he faces his former team, Torino, for the first time since joining Napoli. The 24-year-old defender’s summer transfer was not without its share of drama and emotion, particularly given his deep-rooted connection to Torino. Buongiorno’s story with Torino began at the tender age of seven when he joined the youth academy. His journey from ball boy to first-team player and eventually captain is a testament to his talent and dedication. It didn’t take long for him to capture the hearts of Torino fans, The post Buongiorno’s journey: From Torino’s heart to Napoli’s ambition appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Napooli: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Napoli prepare to face Torino, manager Antonio Conte is likely to maintain his preferred lineup, with only reserve full-back Pasquale Mazzocchi sidelined due to a recent leg injury. The Azzurri’s absence from European competitions this season has allowed Conte to establish a consistent starting eleven, particularly in defense. The midfield will see Scott McTominay providing support to Napoli’s potent attacking trio. In the final third, the highly-coveted Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, reportedly a target for Manchester United, will combine with Matteo Politano and Romelu Lukaku. The Belgian striker aims to build on his impressive record of nine Serie A goal involvements The post Serie A | Torino v Napooli: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog inc Fiorentina-Inter, Torino-Napoli, Lecce-Juventus
Napoli face Torino to retain top spot
arts.sum: Napoli have kept eight clean sheets so far, fewer only than Juventus (10) in the big five European leagues this season; in particular, the Partenopei have only conceded one goal in the first half away from home (against Inter), no team has done better (one also for Lazio, Lille and Real Madrid). Torino and Napoli are two of the five teams to record four victories by a one goal margin this league season (along with Fiorentina, Inter and Udinese), only Lazio (5) boast more such wins in this Serie A season.

arts.ttl: Napoli eye Juventus Defender Danilo as top target
arts.sum: Napoli are gearing up for the winter transfer window, with Antonio Conte’s squad looking to bolster their defensive lineup. The current Serie A leaders have set their sights on Juventus defender Danilo as one of their prime targets. Gianluca Di Marzio reports how the Brazilian international, who is set to return to the starting lineup for Juventus in their upcoming match against Lecce, faces a period of reflection regarding his future in January. Once a pivotal figure in Massimiliano Allegri’s plans, Danilo has found himself on the fringes under new manager Thiago Motta. Napoli’s interest in Danilo is no secret, The post Napoli eye Juventus Defender Danilo as top target appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Napoli Manager Dismisses Speculation Over Unsettled Forward’s Transfer to Juventus
arts.sum: Napoli boss Antonio Conte has shut down rumors over Giacomo Raspadori's potential switch to fierce rivals Juventus. Despite failing to establish himself as a permanent starter at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona, the 24-year-old remains firmly in Conte's plans for the Partenopei. The post Napoli Manager Dismisses Speculation Over Unsettled Forward’s Transfer to Juventus appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli Ready to Challenge Premier League Several Giants for Lecce Starlet
arts.sum: Serie A pacesetters Napoli have repeatedly joined several Premier League clubs in the race for the sought-after Lecce utility man, Patrick Dorgu. According to Calciomercato, Antonio Conte's men are eager to fight Chelsea for the 20-year-old sensation's signature. The post Napoli Ready to Challenge Premier League Several Giants for Lecce Starlet appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
